title: Tabvid
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Tabvids''' were populist media outlets, probably a form of [[newsfeed]]. On [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] during the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]], they served as the main source of salacious society gossip for the general population, but it is not clear whether the term was completely synonymous with [[sludgenews]].<ref name="CotJ">[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']]</ref>

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']]
